title: Obsidian vs Roam Research
description: Compare Obsidian vs Roam Research in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right productivity tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Obsidian emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.6/5 rating compared to 4.3/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Obsidian or Roam Research?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Obsidian edges ahead with a 4.6/5 rating. Obsidian excels at Local-first knowledge management and note-taking application., while Roam Research is stronger for Networked thought note-taking platform for research and knowledge work..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Obsidian and Roam Research?
faqs.answer: Obsidian and Roam Research differ in pricing (Free vs $15-50/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Obsidian cheaper than Roam Research?
faqs.answer: Obsidian starts at Free while Roam Research starts at $15-50/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Obsidian or Roam Research?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for productivity. Obsidian scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Obsidian and Roam Research together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Obsidian or Roam Research?
faqs.answer: Both Obsidian and Roam Research prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which productivity tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Roam Research for large teams, while Obsidian may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Free pricing.
